英國英格蘭爾希布盧可
zh.Shipbrook, England: 英國英格蘭爾希布盧可
zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Vernon於大約1270年出生在英國爾希布盧可時，他的父親Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook30歲，母親Mary Dacre11歲。他與Margaret St Pierre結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年4月24日在英國爾保斯托享年43歲，埋葬在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德。

英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.Shipbrook, England: 英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Vernon于大约1270年出生在英国爾希布盧可时，他的父亲Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook30岁，母亲Mary Dacre11岁。他与Margaret St Pierre结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年4月24日在英国爾保斯托享年43岁，埋葬在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Vernon was born about 1270, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, was 30 and his mother, Mary Dacre, was 11. He married Margaret St Pierre. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 April 1312, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Vernon est né environ 1270, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary Dacre, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Margaret St Pierre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1312, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Vernon um 1270 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook 30 und seine Mutter Mary Dacre 11. Er hat Margaret St Pierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. April 1312 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Bostock, Cheshire, England und wurde in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Vernon è nato il circa 1270 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mary Dacre, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Margaret St Pierre. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 aprile 1312, nel Bostock, Cheshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Macclesfield, Cheshire, England.

ja.Shipbrook, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルーク
ja.Bostock, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアボストック
ja.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Vernonが約1270年にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrookは30歳，母Mary Dacreは11歳であった。Margaret St Pierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年4月24日にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで43歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Vernon(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Dacre(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Margaret St Pierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 4월 24일 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에 묻혔다.

Shipbrook, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Shipbrook, England: Shipbrook, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary Dacre, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret St Pierre. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1312, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Vernon родился около 1270 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Dacre, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret St Pierre. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 апреля 1312 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1270, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary Dacre, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Margaret St Pierre. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de abril de 1312, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
